datafeed_id.description: Identifier for the datafeed. You can stop multiple datafeeds in a single API request by using a comma-separated list of datafeeds or a wildcard expression. You can close all datafeeds by using `_all` or by specifying `*` as the identifier.

allow_no_match.description: Refer to the description for the `allow_no_match` query parameter.

force.description: Refer to the description for the `force` query parameter.

timeout.description: Refer to the description for the `timeout` query parameter.

close_job.description: Refer to the description for the `close_job` query parameter.
